title: Bank Statement Converter
description: Convert any bank statement (PDF text, CSV, Excel, or plain text) into a clean, standardized CSV format. Supports all countries, banks, and currencies.

uploadSection.title: Upload or Paste Statement
uploadSection.description: Paste your bank statement text or upload a TXT/CSV file

placeholders.input:
Paste your bank statement here...

Example:
Date        Description              Debit    Credit   Balance
01/01/2024  Opening Balance                            5000.00
02/01/2024  ATM Withdrawal          500.00            4500.00
03/01/2024  Salary Credit                   3000.00  7500.00

messages.noTransactions: No transactions detected. Please ensure the statement contains valid transaction data.
messages.emptyInput: Please paste your bank statement text
messages.fileError: Please upload a TXT or CSV file. For PDF/Excel files, copy and paste the text content.
messages.readError: Failed to read file. Please try again.
messages.processingError: An error occurred while processing the statement. Please check the format and try again.

outputSection.title: Converted CSV Output
outputSection.description: Your standardized bank statement in CSV format
